_comment_2: Hand-written to give fraiseql-server a non-empty schema so it boots cleanly under the file-storage overlay. The docs-test only exercises /health and /storage/v1/* 404s — no real data reads required. We DELIBERATELY do NOT populate a `storage.buckets` block here: at frozen SHA the off-the-shelf binary's ServerSubsystemsBuilder is never called (FW-7 #334), so populating buckets would not flip the binary into wiring the storage subsystem. Populating buckets here would mislead the harness into believing the schema-driven path exists.
_source: src/content/docs/features/file-storage.md — StorageObject type used as a placeholder bucket-row shape.
_baseline_example: scripts/docs-test/fixtures/postgres/_smoke.compiled.json — used as the shape reference (Cycle 5 smoke).

types.name: StorageObject
types.description: A storage object record (placeholder; the docs-test does not read from this view).
